untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires detection of symmetrical triangle formation, identification of partial rise within formation boundary (upper trend line proximity), and measure rule computation (difference between formation high and low). These geometric/structural pattern elements cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators. The signal fundamentally requires visual pattern detection and multi-point geometric analysis not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to encode bear market context (close below SMA_200) and reversal logic (price heading back down after partial rise, crossing above SMA_50 to exit). However, the core pattern detection, trend line validation, and measure rule calculation are pattern-recognition tasks requiring untranslatable visual/geometric analysis. Hold period set to ~7 months (210 days) per source material. Stop loss set to conservative 2% due to AUTHOR_SILENT specification.
